title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 7–11, this part focuses on Big Mom, Unknown person #5, Big Mom Pirates, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #6 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: How dare you disobey Mama's orders!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Zets! Look here! Your favorite weather eggs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They are filled with juicy thunder- heads!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! You sun guy! How dare you burn these trees!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Even Busoshoku does not work on him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must be worse than a Loga type!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I get this last yummy thunder- cloud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Get over that bridge quickly, every- one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course it worked! He's just animated, concentrated flame!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think of him as just a talking wildfire!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't get separated from each other! We'll never be able to find each other again!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
